name: adaptiveui-skill
description: Explicit S and N workflows that derive resilient adaptive UI effects from product requests.

interface.shortDescription: Derive adaptive UI work from explicitly invoked product requests.
interface.longDescription: Use AdaptiveUI-S for standard responsive UI work, or AdaptiveUI-N for implementation with a required scoped post-change audit. Both derive adaptive UI effects even when a product request does not mention UI, exclude cosmetic-only and unrelated requirements, and verify browser-preview encoding when relevant.
defaultPrompt: Use $adaptiveui-s on this request and handle only its in-scope adaptive UI effects.
Use $adaptiveui-n on this feature; derive its adaptive UI effects and complete the required scoped audit.
